REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (227 Lee Street, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Jun-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Mary Jane Gordon appearing for and with Steven Lockhart. Sale is confirmed at $525,000.00. Sale proceeds are to be deposited into a blocked account from escrow. Order signed. Status for filing of blocked account receipt is set on 7/9.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Arias.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-14-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Mary Jane Gordon appearing for and with Steven Lockhart. Will Dawkins specially appearing for and with Ruby Rapp. Ms. Rapp is dismissing her petition. Mr. Lockhart's petition for appointment is set for hearing on 4/11. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Continued To Mar-14-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Ruby Rapp appearing as petitioner. Steven Lockhart appeared. The bond issue is not resolved. Court told both parties that they will need get counsel. Matter is continued to 3/14 for parties to get counsel. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-14-2006 Continued To Feb-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner appeared to request for continuance to get counsel. Billie Vanderbilt also in court. Matter is continued to 2/28. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-03-2006 Continued To Feb-14-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
